question_variations: What are the Guidance Office hours?
When is the Guidance Office open?
What time can I visit the counselor?
When can I go to the Guidance Office?
response: The University Guidance Center offers counseling services from Monday to Friday. Depending on your assigned counselor and location, counseling services are available between 7:00 AM and 9:00 PM. Students are encouraged to visit during office hours or contact their assigned counselor before visiting whenever possible.
follow_up_questions: Would you like your assigned counselor's schedule?
Would you like the Guidance Office's Facebook page?

question_variations: Who is the counselor for Computer Science?
Who is assigned to my program?
response: For the School of Computing, counselor assignments are organized by academic program. BS Computer Science and BS EMC (Digital Animation) students are assigned to Sir Ryan. BS Information Technology (Web Development and Network Administration) and BS Cybersecurity students are assigned to Ma'am Hannah.
follow_up_questions: Which program are you currently enrolled in?
Would you like your counselor's office schedule?

question_variations: How can I meet Ma'am Hannah?
response:
Ma'am Hannah provides both onsite and online counseling services.

SJH-206
• Monday–Friday
• 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM

PGN-105
• Monday–Friday
• 7:00 AM – 9:00 PM

Students may also contact her through her official Facebook account.

question_variations: How can I contact the Guidance Office?
Where can I message the Guidance Office?
response: The University Guidance Center maintains official Facebook pages for announcements and student communication. Students may also contact their assigned counselor through their official Facebook pages for counseling-related inquiries and scheduling.
